strengths: 15+ years of polyglot full-stack engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput systems
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform demonstrating entrepreneurial initiative and product ownership
Active contributor to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at current role
concerns: No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in an AI-related field as preferred
Limited demonstrated track record of AI/ML products, platforms, or recognized AI expertise
Title history (Senior/Staff) does not reflect Principal/Director-level IC scope or strategic advisory experience

key_factors.factor: Depth of AI/ML expertise and shipped AI products
Breadth of engineering experience across stacks and domains
Strategic leadership and executive-level customer advisory experience

response.justification: The candidate brings deep, versatile software engineering experience spanning ~15 years, open-source entrepreneurship, and recent exposure to AI-agent tooling, which aligns with the builder-fluency aspect of the role. However, the resume shows limited evidence of recognized AI expertise, shipped AI platforms, or Principal/Director-level strategic advisory work with customers and partners, which are central to this position.
